notes: All figures are in SGD (S$). No meaningful direct D01 HDB 4-room stock was found, so this is extrapolated from nearby Central Area / D02 / D03 HDB 4-room comparables, especially Pinnacle@Duxton and adjacent Bukit Merah/Tanjong Pagar fringe blocks. The 1,001 sqft size is effectively the same as 93 sqm. Recent prime Central Area 4-room transactions clustered around S$1.175m–S$1.20m for 93–96 sqm units, with premium high-floor deals up to S$1.55m; a live asking comp at 10B Boon Tiong Road was S$1.21m.
